title: viola serpens var. pilosa
intro: Viola serpens var. pilosa, also known as the trailing viola or small-leaf pansy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the violet family (Violaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Viola serpens var. pilosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, from minor skin issues to more serious infections.
